layers_executed: Layer 1: Seed data (41 rows across 6 staging tables)
Layer 3: SCD1 + SCD2 dimensions (dim_product, dim_agent, dim_customer)
Layer 4: DQ checks via proc_etl_dq_checks (10 checks, RAISE on 3 failures as expected)
Layer 6: Aggregation tables (agg_policy_monthly, agg_claims_monthly, cross-aggregate UPDATE)

failures.description: Cross-aggregate UPDATE agg_claims_monthly FROM agg_policy_monthly produced 0 rows
failures.root_cause: Seed data grain mismatch — the two aggregate tables have different dimension combinations and the small seed dataset has no overlapping (year, month, lob_code, state_code) tuples
failures.classification: test-data coverage gap, NOT a conversion defect

dq_procedure_behavior.raise_behavior: Correctly raised exception on 3 failures — validated error handling path

findings.description: RAISE USING MESSAGE = <dynamic_string> syntax does not work reliably inside $$ blocks when message involves ::VARCHAR casts
findings.workaround: Declare custom EXCEPTION and use RAISE <exception_name>
findings.status: documented — proc passed compilation-only validation but runtime execution used EXCEPTION pattern
